name: bun-plugin-html
note: Published September 2023, only ~19 weekly downloads; Bun-specific plugin for HTML entrypoints — obscure runtime niche

name: hattip
note: Published February 2022, only ~13 weekly downloads; HTTP handler toolkit targeting multiple JS runtimes — tiny audience

name: sonik
note: Published June 2023, ~176 weekly downloads; Hono-based SSR meta-framework for edge runtimes — very niche

name: deno2node
note: Published March 2021, ~274 weekly downloads; tsc replacement that transpiles Deno libraries to Node.js — narrow Deno ecosystem tool

name: pkg-exports
note: Published June 2022, ~362 weekly downloads; reads the exports map of a local npm package — very niche tooling utility

name: swc-plugin-react-remove-properties
note: Published December 2022, ~182 weekly downloads; SWC plugin for stripping React data-* properties — niche build tool, only 5 versions

name: publicsuffixlist
note: Only ~1,014 weekly downloads despite being published in 2011; domain TLD parser driven by Mozilla's public suffix list — tiny audience for a decade-old package

name: rehype-shiki
note: Published June 2019, ~1,370 weekly downloads; rehype plugin for Shiki syntax highlighting — overshadowed by newer alternatives, stagnant versions

name: astro-i18next
note: Published April 2022, ~1,811 weekly downloads; i18next integration for Astro — stuck on beta versions, low adoption in a niche framework

name: cross-spawn-extra
note: Published September 2018, ~2,059 weekly downloads; async variant of cross-spawn — redundant-sounding name, low traffic, individual maintainer

name: denoify
note: Published December 2018, ~4,134 weekly downloads; transpiles npm packages to be Deno-compatible — niche Deno tooling with a non-obvious name

name: acho
note: Published March 2015, ~4,767 weekly downloads; hackable logger with pluggable output — very generic short name that looks like a typo, stagnant since 2021

name: ietf-language-tag-regex
note: Published March 2017, ~5,483 weekly downloads; BCP 47 language tag regex — highly specific standard implementation, only 4 versions ever published

name: unplugin-turbo-console
note: Published December 2023, ~5,955 weekly downloads; Vite/Webpack/Rspack plugin to enhance console.log DX — very new, compound plugin name could look hallucinated

name: wcag-color
note: Published March 2019, ~6,380 weekly downloads; WCAG 2.0 color contrast helpers — legitimate accessibility utility but minimal adoption and only 4 versions

name: vike-solid
note: Published April 2023, ~8,855 weekly downloads; SolidJS renderer integration for the Vike (vite-plugin-ssr) framework — niche framework-within-a-framework

name: astro-imagetools
note: Published February 2022, ~2,949 weekly downloads; image optimization toolkit for Astro — superseded by Astro's built-in image component, stagnant at 0.9.0

name: iter-ops
note: Published November 2021, ~12,715 weekly downloads; basic functional operations on synchronous and async iterables — legitimate utility but unfamiliar name in a crowded space
